stdout:
Implemented targeted fixes from `iteration_2/feedback_input.json` and verified tests pass.

Changes made:
- Updated energy UI to show transformation explicitly:
  - Added `KE`, `PE`, and `Total Energy` readouts in [index.html](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/Testing/Testing%20Loop/bad-shm-visualizer/public/index.html:19).
- Updated simulation logic/readouts:
  - Computes and displays `KE = 1/2 m v^2`, `PE = 1/2 k x^2`, and `Total = KE + PE` each frame in [app.js](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/Testing/Testing%20Loop/bad-shm-visualizer/public/app.js:29).
  - Keeps SHM analytical motion and delta-time frame decoupling in [app.js](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/Testing/Testing%20Loop/bad-shm-visualizer/public/app.js:22).
  - Refined procedural spring to fixed coil count with pitch/appearance driven by current length in [app.js](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/Testing/Testing%20Loop/bad-shm-visualizer/public/app.js:44).
- Minor layout support for extra readouts:
  - Enabled readout wrapping in [styles.css](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/Testing/Testing%20Loop/bad-shm-visualizer/public/styles.css:55).

Validation:
- Ran `npm.cmd test` at `C:\Users\William\Desktop\Projects\Genai_2026`.
- Result: `All tests passed` (with expected sandbox skips).
